title: Nutty and Creamy Caramelized Corn Flatbread
description: A kid-friendly Mexican dish featuring nut-free corn tortillas caramelized into a creamy and delicious flatbread that is both nutritious and easy to make.

ingredients.name: 1 cup corn tortilla chips
ingredients.notes: Coated in nutritional yeast for a nutty flavor

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lime
ingredients.notes: To add acidity and prevent browning too quickly

instructions: Lay out corn tortilla chips on a baking sheet.
Drizzle melted butter over the tortillas, evenly distributing it.
Sprinkle lime juice on top of the butter for faster caramelization and color retention.
Sprinkle garlic powder and salt over the tortillas. If using cheddar cheese, layer it on top as well for extra creaminess.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 8-10 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
